top_signals.title: Korea Short-Term Debt Pricing Too Many BOK Hikes, NH Amundi Says
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s bond market is pricing in an excessive number of central bank rate hikes, creating buying opportunities in short-term debt, according to NH Amundi Asset Management Co.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Codelco Union Threatens Protests as Misreporting Fallout Spreads
top_signals.summary: One of Codelco’s biggest unions vowed to fight any attempt to claw back bonuses as fallout from the overstatement of copper output at the Chilean state miner continues to spread.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Reeves urges ministers to ‘buy British’ in critical sectors
top_signals.summary: UK chancellor aims to prioritise domestic procurement in shipbuilding, steel, AI and energy infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How the SNP survived scandal to keep ruling Scotland
top_signals.summary: Pro-independence party, now in its 20th year in power, is struggling to boost public services amid fiscal challenges
